title: vendor latest github.com/urfave/cli
body:
Change from an external patched branch to the upstream master. The
vendored code is indentical to the previous one.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body: Notice that this PR is just changing the remote reference. The vendored code is identical and thus doesn't change.

LGTM
and awesome news that your patch made it in upstream.  Thanks again!

:pushpin: Commit dae3a02 has been approved by `mheon`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
